set.name: LORT-MTN
set.longname: Legends Of Runeterra Converted: Call of the Mountain

card.name: Pesky Specter
card.text: Ephemeral (This creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it.) When Pesky Specter is destroyed, random target opponent creates two Pesky Specter tokens. Whenever Pesky Specter is exiled, each player exiles each creature they control named Pesky Specter.

card.name: Blade of the Exile
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, remove three experience counters from yourself. Put a +2/+0 counter, a trample counter, and a first strike counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Glinting Blade Fragment
card.text: Focus (This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.) You get an experience counter. Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until the end of your turn.

card.name: Heavy Blade Fragment
card.text: Focus (This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.) You get an experience counter. Target creature you control gets trample until the end of your turn.

card.name: Keen Blade Fragment
card.text: Focus (This instant cannot be cast during the combat phase or in response to another spell or ability.) You get an experience counter. Target creature you control gets first strike until the end of your turn.

card.name: Calibrum
Celestial Equinox
card.text: Remove all abilities and counters from target non-legendary creature.

card.name: Cosmic Inspiration
card.text: Creatures you control get +2/+2.

card.name: Cosmic Rays
card.text: Exile each creature opponents control with power 3 or less.

card.name: Crescendum
Crescent Strike
card.text: Put a stun counter onto two target creatures an opponent controls.

card.name: Falling Comet
card.text: Exile target permanent.

card.name: Gem LORT-MTN
card.text: {1}: Sacrifice Gem, remove 1 damage from target creature, then put a +1/+0 counter on it.

card.name: Gravitum
Infernum
Living Legends
card.text: (You may cast a legendary sorcery only if you control a legendary creature or planeswalker.) Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal X Celestial cards, then choose up to X Celestial cards revealed this way and add them to your hand where X is equal to the number of cards in your hand plus one, shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. Then untap all permanents you control.

card.name: Meteor Shower
card.text: Meteor Shower deals 4 damage to target creature and 1 damage to other target creature.

card.name: Moonglow
card.text: Put a +0/+2 counter and a spellshield counter on target creature you control. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)

card.name: Moonsilver
card.text: The next spell you cast this turn costs {1} less to cast.

card.name: Severum
Supernova
card.text: Exile two target permanents.

card.name: Written in Stars
card.text: Search your library for a legendary creature, exile it, then shuffle. You may cast the creature exiled this way from exile for as long as it remains exiled, it costs {1} less to cast. When the creature exiled this way enters, put two +1/+1 counters on it.

card.name: The Charger
card.text: Trample

card.name: The Destroyer
card.text: Trample The Destroyer enters with a spellshield counter. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.) When The Destroyer enters, put a +1/+0 counter on it for each Celestial creature you control, and each Celestial card in your graveyard.

card.name: The Golden Sister
card.text: Lifelink When The Golden Sister enters, create a The Silver Sister token.

card.name: The Great Beyond
card.text: Flying, Fury (Whenever a creature dealt damage by The Great Beyond this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on The Great Beyond.) The Great Beyond enters with a spellshield counter. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.) When The Great Beyond enters, put a +1/+0 counter on it for each Celestial creature you control, and for each Celestial card in your graveyard.

card.name: The Immortal Fire
card.text: Flying When The Immortal Fire enters, put a +1/+0 counter on it for each Celestial creature you control, and for each Celestial card in your graveyard. Undying (When this creature dies, if it had no +1/+1 counters on it, return it to the battlefield under its owner's control with a +1/+1 counter on it.)

card.name: The Messenger
card.text: When The Messenger enters, draw a card.

card.name: The Scourge
card.text: Trample, Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.) When The Scourge enters, put a +1/+0 counter on it for each Celestial creature you control, and for each Celestial card in your graveyard. Whenever The Scourge attacks, each other attacking creature you control gets +2/+2 and trample until the end of turn.

card.name: The Serpent
card.text: Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)

card.name: The Silver Sister LORT-MTN
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.)

card.name: The Traveler
card.text: When The Traveler enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: The Trickster
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.)

card.name: The Warrior
card.text: Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)

card.name: Captain Arrika
card.text: Captain Arrika enters with a spellshield counter. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.) When Captain Arrika enters, you may exile target creature an opponent controls until Captain Arrika leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Confront
card.text: Put a challenger counter on target creature you control. If the target creature is a dragon, draw a card. (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)

card.name: Dragonguard Lieutenant
card.text: When Dragonguard Lieutenant enters, you may behold a Dragon, if you do, put a challenger counter on Dragonguard Lieutenant. (To behold a Dragon, if you do, put a challenger counter on Dragonguard Lieutenant., choose a Dragon, if you do, put a challenger counter on Dragonguard Lieutenant. you control or reveal a Dragon, if you do, put a challenger counter on Dragonguard Lieutenant. card from your hand.)

card.name: Dragonguard Lookout
card.text: When Dragonguard Lookout enters, you may behold a Dragon, if you do, untap each creature you control. After this phase, there is an additional combat phase. (To behold a Dragon, if you do, untap each creature you control., choose a Dragon, if you do, untap each creature you control. you control or reveal a Dragon, if you do, untap each creature you control. card from your hand.)

card.name: Egghead Researcher
card.text: When Egghead Researcher enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three dragon creatures, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: For The Fallen
card.text: For The Fallen costs {1} less to cast for each Knight you have cast this turn. Create a Dauntless Vanguard token for each creature you control that was destroyed this turn.

card.name: Kadregrin the Infernal
card.text: Fury (Whenever a creature dealt damage by Kadregrin this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Kadregrin.) When Kadregrin enters, put four +1/+1 counters on each other dragon creature you control.

card.name: Molten Breath
card.text: Choose a creature you control with fury. That creature deals damage equal to its power to the two creatures with the lowest power among creatures target opponent controls.

card.name: Screeching Dragon
card.text: Challenger, Fury (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature. Whenever a creature dealt damage by Screeching Dragon this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Screeching Dragon.)

card.name: Sharpsight
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+2 and can block creatures with shadow as though it had shadow until the end of your next turn. (That creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.)

card.name: Shyvana, The Half-Dragon
card.text: Fury (Whenever a creature dealt damage by Shyvana this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Shyvana.) Whenever Shyvana attacks, Shyvana gets +1/+1 until the beginning of your next upkeep. Whenever a dragon creature you control deals combat damage, put that many Dragonguard counters onto Shyvana. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Shyvana has sixteen or more Dragonguard counters, remove all Dragonguard counters from Shyvana and transform her. Partner --- (Back): Dragonguard Shyvana

card.name: Dragonguard Shyvana
card.text: Fury (Whenever a creature dealt damage by Dragonguard Shyvana this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Dragonguard Shyvana.) Whenever Dragonguard Shyvana attacks, Dragonguard Shyvana gets +2/+2 until the beginning of your next upkeep. Then target creature you control fights target creature an opponent controls. If the creature you control is a dragon and it survives the fight, remove up to 5 damage from it. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.) --- (Front): Shyvana, The Half-Dragon

card.name: Stalking Broodmother
card.text: Fury, Scout (Whenever a creature dealt damage by Stalking Broodmother this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Stalking Broodmother. Once in your pre-combat main phase, you may have any number of creatures with Scout declare an attack without tapping. Opponents may declare blockers as if it were the combat phase.)

card.name: Stony Suppressor
card.text: Instant and sorcery spells cost {1} more to cast.

card.name: Strafing Strike
card.text: Target creature you control fights target creature an opponent controls. If the creature you control is a dragon and it survives the fight, remove up to 5 damage from it. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

card.name: The Grand Plaza
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, that creature gets +1/+1 and challenger until the end of your next turn. (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)

card.name: Fae Guide
card.text: When Fae Guide enters, put a shadow counter on other target creature you control. (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.)

card.name: Flower Child
card.text: Whenever another creature you control targets Flower Child, put a +2/+0 counter on Flower Child.

card.name: Flurry of Fists
card.text: Put a +1/+0 counter and a first strike counter on target creature you control. If the target creature has first strike, put a +1/+0 counter and a double strike counter on it instead.

card.name: Fuzzy Caretaker
card.text: Whenever another creature you control targets Fuzzy Caretaker, Fuzzy Caretaker gets +0/+3 until your next upkeep. Whenever Fuzzy Caretaker attacks, other attacking target creature you control gets +3/+0 until the end of turn.

card.name: Go Get It
card.text: Exile target creature you control to create an exact token copy of it except it has Ephemeral.You may cast the creature exiled this way from exile for as long as it remains exiled. (That creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Homecoming
card.text: Recall a creature or landmark you control to recall a creature or landmark an opponent controls. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)

card.name: Lulu
card.text: Whenever Lulu attacks, other attacking target creature you control has base power and toughness 4/4 until the beginning of your next upkeep. Whenever a creature you control targets another creature you control, put a Whimsy counter on Lulu. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Lulu has three or more Whimsy counters, remove all Whimsy counters from Lulu and transform her. Partner --- (Back): Lulu, The Fae Sorceress

card.name: Lulu, The Fae Sorceress
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep you may choose one — • Put a shield counter on target creature you control. (If it would be dealt damage or destroyed, remove a shield counter from it instead.) • Target creature an opponent controls gets Vulnerable until the end of the turn. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature you control.) Whenever Lulu attacks, other attacking target creature you control has base power and toughness 5/5 until the beginning of your next upkeep. --- (Front): Lulu

card.name: Monastery of Hirana
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put a Sanctuary counter on Monastery of Hirana if it does not have one. {U}: Remove a Sanctuary counter from Monastery of Hirana to recall a creature you control. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)

card.name: Mumblesprite LORT-MTN
card.text: Shadow, Ephemeral (This creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it.) When Mumblesprite enters, its power and toughness equals the power and toughness of target other creature you control.

card.name: Nopeify!
card.text: Counter target spell with mana value 3 or less.

card.name: Pix!
card.text: Pix! enters with a shield counter. Whenever Pix! attacks, other attacking target creature you control gets +2/+1 until the end of turn.

card.name: Singular Will
card.text: Choose a creature, then recall each other creature and landmark. (A recalled permanent is put back into its owners hand from the battlefield.)

card.name: Swole Squirrel
card.text: Whenever Swole Squirrel deals combat damage, double its power.

card.name: Tasty Faefolk
card.text: Lifelink

card.name: Trevor Snoozebottom
card.text: When Trevor Snoozebottom attacks, create a tapped and attacking Mumblesprite token.

card.name: Whimsy!
card.text: Target creature becomes a 1/1 blue Squirrel with no abilities until the end of your turn.

card.name: Young Witch
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) When Young Witch attacks, other attacking target creature you control gets +1/+0 and first strike until the end of turn.

card.name: Crumble
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature you control. Choose one — • Destroy target creature an opponent controls. • Destroy target landmark an opponent controls.

card.name: Doombeast
card.text: Nightfall — When Doombeast enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, put a +1/+0 counter on it for each Nightfall you triggered this turn.

card.name: Duskrider
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Nightfall — When Duskrider enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, put a number of +1/+0 counters on Duskrider for each time you have triggered nightfall this turn.

card.name: Encroaching Shadows
card.text: You get an emblem with "Creatures you cast get +2/+2 and Ephemeral." (That creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Evershade Stalker
card.text: Ephemeral, Fearsome (This creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it. Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Evershade Stalker can't block. Nightfall — When Evershade Stalker enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, create an exiled copy of Evershade Stalker. You may cast this copy from exile for as long as it remains exiled.

card.name: Gluttony
card.text: Sacrifice the nontoken creature with the highest mana value among creatures you control, then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature with a mana value that costs 1 more than the sacrificed creature, put it onto the battlefield, until the end of turn it has haste, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Go Hard
card.text: Go Hard deals 1 damage to target creature an opponent controls. You get 1 life and an experience counter. Create two exiled copies of Go Hard. You may cast copies exiled this way from exile for as long as they remain exiled. --- (Back): Pack Your Bags

card.name: Pack Your Bags
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, remove three experience counters from yourself. Pack Your Bags deals 5 damage to each opponent and each creature they control. --- (Front): Go Hard

card.name: Nocturne
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) Nightfall — When Nocturne enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, put a vulnerable counter on target creature an opponent controls, then all creatures your opponents control get -1/-0 until the beginning of your next upkeep. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature you control.) Whenever a creature you control with fearsome or nightfall attacks, put a Shade counter onto Nocturne. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Nocturne has five or more Shade counters, remove all Shade counters from Nocturne, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Nocturne, The Eternal Nightmare

card.name: Nocturne, The Eternal Nightmare
card.text: Fearsome (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.) When Nocturne transforms, put a vulnerable counter on target creature an opponent controls, then all creatures your opponents control get -1/-0 until the beginning of your next upkeep. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature you control.) Creatures you control have fearsome. Whenever you cast a creature, each creature your opponents control get -1/-0 until the beginning of your next upkeep. --- (Front): Nocturne

card.name: Passage Unearned
card.text: Exile each creature that entered this turn if no mana was spent to cast it.

card.name: Risen Mists
card.text: Create a Mistwraith token.

card.name: Shroud of Darkness
card.text: The next creature you cast this turn gets +1/+0 until the end of your next turn and a spellshield counter. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)

card.name: Stalking Shadows
card.text: Reveal the top four cards in your library, you may choose a nonlegendary creature from among them, if you do, create a token copy of that creature on the battlefield, put an ephemeral counter on it, then add the chosen card to your hand, shuffle all other cards into your library. (That creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Stygian Onlooker
card.text: Nightfall — When Stygian Onlooker enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, Stygian Onlooker gets +2/+0 and fearsome until the end of your next turn. (Creatures with Fearsome cannot be blocked by creatures with power 2 or less.)

card.name: Unspeakable Horror
card.text: Unspeakable Horror deals 1 damage to any target. You gain that much life. Nightfall — When this spell resolves, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three creatures with nightfall, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other cards into your library.

card.name: Vaults of Helia
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, sacrifice a nontoken creature with the greatest mana value among creatures you control. Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature card with mana value equal to 1 plus the sacrificed creature's mana value. Put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Apprehend
card.text: Tap a creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. Then if you control a legendary creature named Darius or Darius, The Hand of Noxus, untap each creature you control and after this phase, there is an additional combat phase.

card.name: Arrel the Tracker
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, if Arrel the Tracker was targeted by a source you control, Arrel the Tracker deals damage equal to its power to the creature with the lowest power among creatures target opponent controls.

card.name: Basilisk Bloodseeker
card.text: When Basilisk Bloodseeker enters, Basilisk Bloodseeker deals 1 damage to target creature you control and target creature an opponent controls. Repeat this process three times.

card.name: Blade Squire
card.text: When Blade Squire is destroyed, search your library for a Rune card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Brutal Hunter
card.text: When Brutal Hunter enters, it gets First strike until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Hunt the Weak
card.text: Target opponent reveals their hand, then discards the creature card with the lowest power from among them.

card.name: Noxkraya Arena
card.text: At the end of your turn, the creature with highest power among creatures you control, and the creature with lowest power among creatures target opponent controls fight. (Each deals damage equal to its power to the other.)

card.name: Riven, The Exile
card.text: Whenever Riven enters, attacks, or at the end of your turn if Riven did not attack, search your library and/or graveyard for a Rune card, reveal it, then it to your hand. If you searched your library this way, shuffle. The first time you cast a card named Blade of the Exile, transform Riven. Partner --- (Back): Riven, The Reckoner

card.name: Riven, The Reckoner
card.text: Whenever Riven enters, attacks, or at the end of your turn if Riven did not attack, search your library and/or graveyard and/or exile for a Rune card, reveal it, then it to your hand. If you searched your library this way, shuffle. Each turn the first time a source you control increases Riven's power, put that many +1/+0 counters on Riven. --- (Front): Riven, The Exile

card.name: Runeweaver
card.text: When Runeweaver enters, search your library for a Rune card, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Scorched Earth
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target damaged creature. • Destroy target landmark.

card.name: Sharpened Resolve
card.text: Target creature you control gets +3/+2 until the end of the your turn.

card.name: Survival Skills
card.text: Creatures you control get Indestructible until the end of your next turn. If Survival Skills is discarded or milled, the creature with the highest power among creatures you control gets Indestructible until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Weapon Hilt
card.text: Target creature you control gets +2/+0 until the end of turn. Then search your library for a Rune card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Wild Claws
card.text: Choose a creature you control, that creature deals damage equal to its power to target creature an opponent controls. If the creature you control has trample, excess damage is dealt to the target creatures controller.

card.name: Wrathful Rider
card.text: Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.)

card.name: Augur of the Old Ones
card.text: Trample, Juggernaut (After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.) When Augur of the Old Ones enters, if you behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, give target creature Trample and Juggernaut. (To behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, choose a card with mana value 8 or greater you control or reveal a card with mana value 8 or greater from your hand.)

card.name: Call the Wild
card.text: Reveal the top four cards of your library, then put each Poro, Yeti, and Elnuk creature among them into your hand, shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Faces of the Old Ones
card.text: When Faces of the Old Ones enters, put a Freljord counter onto a land you control. At the beginning of your upkeep, you may Behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, if you do, put a Freljord counter onto a land you control. (To behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, choose a card with mana value 8 or greater you control or reveal a card with mana value 8 or greater from your hand.) Whenever a land you control with a Freljord counter is tapped for mana, its controller adds an additional one mana of any type that land can produce.

card.name: Feel The Rush
card.text: Choose 3, 4, or 5, then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal that many legendary creatures, randomly choose two with different names from among them, and put them onto the battlefield under your control, they have base power and toughness 10/10, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Ice Pillar
card.text: Vulnerable (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature you control.) When Ice Pillar enters from exile add {G}{G}{G}{G}{G}{G}{G}{G}. When Ice Pillar enters and at the beginning of your upkeep, the creature with the highest power among creatures target opponent controls gets Vulnerable until the beginning of your next upkeep.

card.name: Icequake
card.text: All creatures get -3/-0 until the end of your next turn. Then Icequake deals 3 damage to all creatures.

card.name: It That Stares
card.text: When It That Stares enters, choose one — • Exile all enchantments. • It That Stares deals 3 damage to each other creature.

card.name: Revitalizing Roar
card.text: Reveal a creature in your hand, you gain X life where X is that creatures power. If you are Enlightened, put the revealed creature onto the battlefield. (The first time you spend 10 or more mana in the same turn, you are Enlightened for the rest of the game.)

card.name: The Howling Abyss
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a legendary creature, exile it, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. You may cast cards exiled this way for as long as it remains exiled.

card.name: The Scargrounds
card.text: Whenever a creature you control is dealt damage but is not destroyed, put a +1/+0 counter on it, then put an Absorb 1 counter on that creature if it doesn't have an Absorb counter. (If a source would deal damage to that creature, prevent 1 of that damage.)

card.name: Troll Chant
card.text: Target creature you control gets +0/+2 and target creature an opponent controls gets -2/-0 until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Troll Gifts
card.text: Choose one — • Put two +1/+1 counters on target creature. • Put a juggernaut counter on target creature. (After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)

card.name: Troll Ravager
card.text: When Troll Ravager enters, you may behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, if you do, put a juggernaut counter on Troll Ravager. (To behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, choose a card with mana value 8 or greater you control or reveal a card with mana value 8 or greater from your hand. After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)

card.name: Troll Scavenger
card.text: When Troll Scavenger enters, you may behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, if you do, put three +1/+0 counters on Troll Scavenger. (To behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, choose a card with mana value 8 or greater you control or reveal a card with mana value 8 or greater from your hand.)

card.name: Trundle
card.text: Juggernaut (After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.) When Trundle enters, search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Ice Pillar, and exile it. If you search your library this way, shuffle. You may cast the card exiled this way from exile for as long as it remains exiled. When a card named Ice Pillar you control enters, transform Trundle. Partner --- (Back): Trundle, The Troll King

card.name: Trundle, The Troll King
card.text: Trample, Juggernaut (After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.) Whenever Trundle attacks, you may behold any number of cards with mana value 8 or greater, if you do, put a +1/+0 counter on Trundle for each card beheld this way. (To behold a card with mana value 8 or greater, choose a card with mana value 8 or greater you control or reveal a card with mana value 8 or greater from your hand.) --- (Front): Trundle

card.name: Uzgar the Ancient
card.text: Challenger, Juggernaut (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature. After the combat damage step on your turn, if this creature has not been destroyed, remove all damage from this creature.)

card.name: Voices of the Old Ones
card.text: Add {G}{G}. Reveal the top five cards of your library, put each card with mana value 8 or greater from among them into your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Sun Guardian
card.text: Daybreak — When Sun Guardian enters, if it was the first spell you cast this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Sun Guardian. Whenever another daybreak ability you control triggers, put a +1/+1 counter on Sun Guardian.

card.name: Arbiter of the Peak
card.text: Trample Arbiter of the Peak costs {1} less to cast for each time an instant, sorcery, or creature you control has targeted a creature you control this turn.

card.name: Astral Protection
card.text: Remove 4 damage from target creature you control. Put four +0+1 counters on that creature.

card.name: Aurelion Sol
card.text: Fury (Whenever a creature dealt damage by Aurelion Sol this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Aurelion Sol.) Aurelion Sol enters with a spellshield counter. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.) When Aurelion Sol enters, and at the beginning of your upkeep, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. At the beginning of your end step, if you have 20 or more power among creatures you control, transform Aurelion Sol. Partner --- (Back): Aurelion Sol, The Star Forger

card.name: Aurelion Sol, The Star Forger
card.text: Fury (Whenever a creature dealt damage by Aurelion Sol this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Aurelion Sol.) When Aurelion Sol transforms, put a spellshield counter on him. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.) When Aurelion Sol transforms, and at the beginning of your upkeep, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. You may cast Celestial cards without paying it's mana cost. --- (Front): Aurelion Sol

card.name: Bastion
card.text: Put a +1/+1 counter and a spellshield counter on target creature you control. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)

card.name: Behold the Infinite
card.text: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Blessing of Targon
card.text: Put three +1/+1 counters on target creature you control.

card.name: Broadbacked Protector
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, put three -0/-1 counters on Broadbacked Protector. You gain 3 life.

card.name: Commander Leona
card.text: Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.) Daybreak — When Commander Leona enters, if it was the first spell you cast this turn, tap the creature with the highest power among creatures target opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. Whenever a source you control triggers its daybreak ability, put a Dawn counter onto Commander Leona. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Commander Leona has four or more Dawn counters, remove all Dawn counters from Commander Leona, then transform her. Partner --- (Back): Leona, Aspect of the Sun

card.name: Leona, Aspect of the Sun
card.text: Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.) Whenever a source you control triggers its daybreak ability, tap the creature with the highest power among creatures target opponent controls without a stun counter, put a stun counter on it, then put a shield counter onto Leona if she doesn't have one. --- (Front): Commander Leona

card.name: Crescent Guardian
card.text: Trample Nightfall — When Crescent Guardian enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, put a +2/+0 counter on Crescent Guardian.

card.name: Crystal Ibex
card.text: When Crystal Ibex enters, put a trample counter on other target creature you control.

card.name: Cygnus the Moonstalker
card.text: Shadow (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.) Nightfall — When Cygnus enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, a creature you control gets Shadow until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Diana, Child of the Moon
card.text: First strike Whenever a source you control triggers its nightfall ability, Diana gets challenger until the end of turn. (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.) Whenever a source you control triggers its nightfall ability, put a Dusk counter onto Diana. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Diana has four or more Dusk counters, remove all Dusk counters from Diana, then transform her. Partner --- (Back): Diana, Aspect of the Moon

card.name: Diana, Aspect of the Moon
card.text: First strike Whenever a source you control triggers its nightfall ability, Diana gets challenger and +2/+0 until the end of turn. (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.) --- (Front): Diana, Child of the Moon

card.name: Divergent Paths
card.text: Choose one — • Destroy target landmark. • Search your library for a landmark card, reveal it and add it to your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Dragon's Clutch
card.text: Choose one — • Put a +1/+1 counter and a trample counter on each dragon creature you control. • Search your library for two dragon creatures with different names, reveal them, add them to your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Eclipse Dragon
card.text: Fury (Whenever a creature dealt damage by Eclipse Dragon this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Eclipse Dragon.) Daybreak — When Eclipse Dragon enters, if it was the first spell you cast this turn, the next dragon or celestial creature you cast costs {2} less to cast this turn. Nightfall — When Eclipse Dragon enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, choose one — • Reveal the top card of your library until you reveal a dragon creature, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. • Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Fledgling Stellacorn
card.text: Lifelink Fledgling Stellacorn enters with a spellshield counter. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)

card.name: Fused Firebrand
card.text: Fury (Whenever a creature dealt damage by Fused Firebrand this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Fused Firebrand.) Fused Firebrand enters with a spellshield counter. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)

card.name: Giddy Sparkleologist
card.text: When Giddy Sparkleologist enters, you may behold a Celestial, if you do, target creature you control gets a +1/+1 counter and a spellshield counter. (To behold a Celestial, choose a Celestial you control or reveal a Celestial card from your hand. The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)

card.name: Gift Giver
card.text: When Gift Giver enters, create a Gem token.

card.name: Gifts From Beyond
card.text: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal two luna equipment cards, choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Grandfather Rumul
card.text: Grandfather Rumul enters with a spellshield counter. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.) Trample When Grandfather Rumul enters, put four +0/+1 counter on up to two other target creatures you control.

card.name: Guiding Touch
card.text: Choose one — • Remove all damage from target creature you control. • You gain 2 life. Draw a card.

card.name: Herald of Dragons
card.text: Dragon creatures you control cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Hush
card.text: Remove all abilities and counters from target creature until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Inviolus Vox
card.text: Fury (Whenever a creature dealt damage by Inviolus Vox this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Inviolus Vox.) The first time each turn, a creature dealt damage by a creature with fury you control this turn dies, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three dragon creatures, then randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Lunari Duskbringer
card.text: When Lunari Duskbringer enters, until the end of the turn, the next spell you cast with nightfall costs {1} less to cast.

card.name: Lunari Priestess
card.text: Nightfall — When Lunari Priestess, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Lunari Shadestalker
card.text: Nightfall — When Lunari Shadestalker enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, put a shadow counter on Lunari Shadestalker. (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.)

card.name: Mentor of the Stones
card.text: Whenever Mentor of the Stones attacks, put three +1/+1 counters on other attacking target creature you control. When Mentor of the Stones is destroyed, create three Gem tokens.

card.name: Messenger's Sigil
card.text: Exile a card named The Messenger from your graveyard face down. Create five exiled copies of that card. You may cast these copies from exile for as long as they remain exiled. Exile Messenger's Sigil.

card.name: Moondreamer
card.text: When Moondreamer enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. Nightfall — When Moondreamer enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, reduce the cost of the next Celestial card you cast this turn by {1}.

card.name: Moonlight Affliction
card.text: Remove all abilities and counters from two target creatures until the end of your next turn. Nightfall — When this spell resolves, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, both target creatures can't block until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Morning Light
card.text: Each creature you control gets +1/+1 until the end of the turn. Trigger the daybreak ability of all permanents you control.

card.name: Mountain Goat
card.text: Whenever Mountain Goat deals combat damage, create a Gem token.

card.name: Mountain Scryer
card.text: Allegiance — When this creature enters, reveal the top card of your library. If the revealed card is at least each colour this creature is, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. Celestial cards you control cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: Mountain Sojourners
card.text: Whenever Mountain Sojourners attacks, each other attacking creature you control gets +2/+2 until the end of turn.

card.name: Out Of The Way
card.text: When Out Of The Way enters, draw a card. Whenever a creature you control gets first strike, that ability is not removed if it would be at the end of the turn. The same is true for flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, trample, and vigilance.

card.name: Paddle Star
card.text: Paddle Star deals 5 damage to target attacking or stunned creature.

card.name: Pale Cascade
card.text: Target creature you control gets +1/+1 until the end of turn. Nightfall — When this spell resolves, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, draw a card.

card.name: Porofly
card.text: Porofly enters with a spellshield counter. (The first time an instant, sorcery, or ability an opponent controls targets this permanent, remove a spellshield counter from this permanent and counter that spell or ability.)

card.name: Rahvun, Daylight's Spear
card.text: Daybreak — When Rahvun enters, if it was the first spell you cast this turn, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three creatures with daybreak, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. While Rahvun is on the battlefield, you have "Daybreak abilities you control always trigger."

card.name: Resplendent Stellacorn
card.text: When Resplendent Stellacorn enters, remove 3 damage from target creature you control. You gain 3 life.

card.name: Shards of the Mountain
card.text: Create X Gem tokens where X is the difference between the number of cards in your hand and seven.

card.name: Sleepy Trouble Bubble
card.text: Put a stun counter on a target creature. You may search your library and/or graveyard for a card named Paddle Star, reveal it, and put it into your hand. If you search your library this way, shuffle.

card.name: Sneaky Zeebles
card.text: Flying When Sneaky Zeebles enters, tap each creature opponents control with power 2 or less and put a stun counter on each creature tapped this way.

card.name: Solari Priestess
card.text: Daybreak — When Solari Priestess enters, if it was the first spell you cast this turn, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards with mana value between 4 and 6, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Solari Shieldbearer
card.text: Daybreak — When Solari Shieldbearer enters, if it was the first spell you cast this turn, Solari Shieldbearer gets +0/+4 until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Solari Soldier
card.text: Daybreak — When Solari Soldier enters, if it was the first spell you cast this turn, Solari Soldier gets +1/+1 until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Solari Sunforger
card.text: Daybreak — When Solari Sunforger enters, if it was the first spell you cast this turn, Solari Sunforger gets lifelink until the end of your next turn.

card.name: Soraka, The Horned Healer
card.text: Whenever Soraka attacks, remove up to 4 damage from target other attacking creature you control and Soraka at the beginning of the next post combat main phase. Whenever damage is removed from a creature you control, put a Seer counter on Soraka. At the beginning of any phase on your turn, if Soraka has four or more Seer counters, remove all Seer counters from Soraka, then transform her. Partner --- (Back): Soraka, The Starchild

card.name: Soraka, The Starchild
card.text: The first time each turn damage is removed from a creature you control, draw a card. Whenever Soraka attacks, remove all damage from target other attacking creature you control and Soraka at the beginning of the next post combat main phase. --- (Front): Soraka, The Horned Healer

card.name: Soraka's Wish
card.text: Remove all damage from each creature you control.

card.name: Spacey Sketcher
card.text: When Spacey Sketcher enters, discard a card from your hand, then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards with mana value 3 or less, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Sparklefly
card.text: Lifelink, Skulk

card.name: Spell Thief
card.text: Choose three instant and/or sorcery cards from target opponents graveyard, randomly choose one and exile it, then return the rest to the opponents graveyard. You may cast the exiled card from exile for as long as it remains exiled, and you may spend mana as though it were mana of any colour to cast it.

card.name: Spring Guardian
card.text: When Spring Guardian enters, you may remove all damage from target creature you control.

card.name: Star Shepherd
card.text: Whenever a source you control removes damage from a creature you control, put a +2/+0 counter on Star Shepherd.

card.name: Star Spring
card.text: At the beginning of your end step, remove 1 damage from each creature you control, then put that many Spring counters onto Star Spring. Spring counters cannot be proliferated or copied. At the beginning of your upkeep, if Star Spring has twenty two or more Spring counters, you win the game.

card.name: Starbone
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this card, behold a celestial. (To behold a celestial, choose a celestial you control or reveal a celestial card from your hand.) Search your library and/or graveyard for a card named The Messenger, then exile it. If you search your library this way, shuffle. You may cast the creature exiled this way from exile for as long as it remains exiled. When the exiled creature enters from exile, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Stargazer
card.text: Whenever a source you control removes damage from a creature you control, that creature gets shadow until the end of your next turn. (This creature can block or be blocked by only creatures with shadow.)

card.name: Starry Scamp
card.text: At the beginning of your pre-combat main phase, you may reveal Starry Scamp from your hand and behold a Celestial, if you do, you may cast Starry Scamp without paying its mana cost this turn. (To behold a Celestial, choose a Celestial you control or reveal a Celestial card from your hand.)

card.name: Starshaping
card.text: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards with mana value 7 or greater, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library, then choose one — • Remove 5 damage from target creature you control. • You gain 5 life.

card.name: Startled Stomper
card.text: Trample

card.name: Sunblessed Vigor
card.text: Put a +0/+2 counter on target creature you control.

card.name: Sunburst
card.text: Sunburst deals 6 damage to target creature. Daybreak — When Sunburst is cast, if it was the first spell you cast this turn, before Sunburst deals damage, remove all abilities and counters from the target creature until the end the turn.

card.name: Supercool Starchart
card.text: Reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards with mana value 3 or less, randomly choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Targon's Peak
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, each player randomly exiles a card in their hand. Until the beginning of your next upkeep, the owner of a card exiled this way can cast it from exile without paying its mana cost.

card.name: Taric, The Shield of Valoran
card.text: Whenever Taric attacks, Taric and other attacking target creature you control have Absorb 1 until the end of the turn. Whenever Taric targets another creature you control, copy the last spell you cast that targeted only Taric onto that creature. Whenever a source you control targets a creature you control, put a Bravado counter onto Taric. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Taric has seven or more Bravado counters, remove all Bravado counters from Taric, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Taric, Aspect of the Protector

card.name: Taric, Aspect of the Protector
card.text: Whenever Taric attacks, Taric and other attacking target creature you control have Indestructible until the end of your next turn. Whenever Taric targets another creature you control, copy the last spell you cast that targeted only Taric onto that creature. --- (Front): Taric, The Shield of Valoran

card.name: The Cloven Way
card.text: Nightfall — When The Cloven Way enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, put a stun counter onto target creature, if the target is nonlegendry, put two stun counters onto that creature instead.

card.name: The Fangs
card.text: When The Fangs enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards with mana value 3 or less, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: The Flight
card.text: Whenever The Flight deals combat damage to an opponent, draw a card, then shuffle The Flight into the top three cards of your library.

card.name: The Infinite Mindsplitter
card.text: Fury (Whenever a creature dealt damage by The Infinite Mindsplitter this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on The Infinite Mindsplitter.) When The Infinite Mindsplitter enters, put a Gaze counter on up to two target creatures. At the beginning of your upkeep, put a stun counter onto each creature with a Gaze counter, tap them if they're untapped.

card.name: The Skies Descend
card.text: The Skies Descend costs {2} less to cast for each dragon and celestial creature you control. The Skies Descend deals 15 damage to each creature opponents control.

card.name: The Sky Shadows
card.text: When The Sky Shadows enters, you may you behold a creature with nightfall, if you do, add {C}{C}. (To behold a creature with Nightfall, choose a creature you control with Nightfall or reveal a creature card with Nightfall from your hand.)

card.name: The Veiled Temple
card.text: The first time you cast your second spell each turn, other than The Veiled Temple, add {C}{C} and put a +1/+0 counter onto the creature with the highest power among creatures you control.

card.name: Tyari the Traveler
card.text: Whenever Tyari the Traveler attacks, put a +0/+2 counter on other attacking target creature you control.

card.name: Whiteflame Protector
card.text: Fury (Whenever a creature dealt damage by Whiteflame Protector this turn dies, put a +1/+1 counter on Whiteflame Protector.)

card.name: Zenith Blade
card.text: Put a +1/+2 counter on target creature you control. It has trample until the end of the turn. Daybreak — When this spell resolves, if it was the first spell you cast this turn, search your library for a card named Zenith Blade, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: Zoe, The Everchild
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) Whenever Zoe deals combat damage to an opponent, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards with mana value 3 or less, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. At the end of any phase on your turn, if there are ten or more cards in your graveyard with different names, transform Zoe. Partner --- (Back): Zoe, The Aspect of Twilight

card.name: Zoe, The Aspect of Twilight
card.text: Skulk (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power.) When Zoe transforms, you get a legendary emblem with "Whenever a creature you control enters, if it has first strike, put a first strike counter on each other creature you control. The same is true for flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, trample, and vigilance." Whenever Zoe deals combat damage to an opponent, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three Celestial cards, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. --- (Front): Zoe, The Everchild

card.name: Ballistic Bot
card.text: Upgrade (Whenever you cast an artifact, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control with Upgrade.) At the beginning of your upkeep, Ballistic Bot deals 1 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Aftershock
card.text: Choose one — • Aftershock deals 3 damage to target creature. • Destroy target enchantment.

card.name: Armed Gearhead
card.text: First strike, Upgrade (Whenever you cast an artifact, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control with Upgrade.)

card.name: Calculated Creations
card.text: Search your library and for a card named Armed Gearhead, Ballistic Bot, or Nyandroid, exile it then shuffle. You may cast the card exiled this way from exile for as long as it remains exiled. Whenever creatures exiled this way enters, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Death Ray
card.text: Spree (Choose one or more additional costs.) + {0}: Death Ray deals 1 damage to target creature. + {UR}{UR}: Death Ray deals 2 damage to target creature. + {UR}{UR}{UR}: Death Ray deals 3 damage to target creature.

card.name: Give It All
card.text: You get an emblem with "The base power of creatures you control is equal to the creature with the highest power you control. The base toughness of creatures you control is equal to the creature with the highest toughness you control." You get an emblem with "Creatures you control have first strike if a creature you control has first strike. The same is true for flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, trample, and vigilance." Exile Give It All.

card.name: Hexcore Foundry
card.text: At the beginning of each player's draw step, if Hexcore Foundry is untapped, all players draw a card.

card.name: Iterative Improvement
card.text: Create an exiled copy of a nonlegendary creature you control. You may cast the copy from exile for as long as it remains exiled. Whenever creatures exiled this way enters, put a +1/+1 counter on it.

card.name: Mechanized Mimic
card.text: Upgrade (Whenever you cast an artifact, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control with Upgrade.) Whenever Mechanized Mimic attacks, it gets first strike until end of turn if a creature you control has first strike. The same is true for flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, trample, and vigilance.

card.name: Nyandroid
card.text: Skulk, Upgrade (This creature can't be blocked by creatures with greater power. Whenever you cast an artifact, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control with Upgrade.)

card.name: Patched Porobot
card.text: When Patched Porobot enters, randomly choose an ability from among first strike, flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, trample, and vigilance. Patched Porobot gets that ability.

card.name: Poro Cannon
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, discard a card. Create two Daring Poro tokens.

card.name: Stress Testing
card.text: Remove all finality counters from creatures you control. If Stress Testing is discarded or milled, reveal the top card of your library until you reveal a creature with mana value 1, put it onto the battlefield under your control with a finality counter, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: The University of Piltover
card.text: At the beginning of your pre-combat main phase, discard your hand, then draw 3 cards.

card.name: Tri-beam Improbulator
card.text: Whenever you cast a spell with mana value 3, put a charge counter on Tri-beam Improbulator. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice Tri-beam Improbulator. Tri-beam Improbulator deals X+1 damage to target creature where X is the number of charge counters on Tri-beam Improbulator. Then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a creature with mana value X where X is equal to the number of charge counters on Tri-beam Improbulator, put it onto the battlefield under your control, then shuffle all other cards into your library.

card.name: Viktor, The Machinist
card.text: Upgrade (Whenever you cast an artifact, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control with Upgrade.) {UR}, {T}: Randomly choose an ability from among first strike, flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, trample, and vigilance. Viktor gets the chosen ability. Activate only as a sorcery. Whenever you cast an artifact, put a Herald counter on Viktor. At the end of any phase on your turn, if Viktor has seven or more Herald counters, remove all Hereld counters from Viktor, then transform him. Partner --- (Back): Viktor, The Machine Herald

card.name: Viktor, The Machine Herald
card.text: Upgrade (Whenever you cast an artifact, put a +1/+1 counter on each creature you control with Upgrade.) Artifacts you control cost {UR} less to cast. {UR}, {T}: Randomly choose an ability from among first strike, flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, trample, and vigilance. Viktor gets the chosen ability. Activate only as a sorcery. --- (Front): Viktor, The Machinist

card.name: Bayou Brunch
card.text: Mutate target creature you control under other target creature you control.

card.name: Boomship
card.text: Boomship deals 1 damage to target creature. Then create that many Powder Keg tokens.

card.name: Boxtopus
card.text: Challenger (Whenever this creature attacks, you may have target creature defending player controls untap and block this creature, even if they can't block this creature.) Boxtopus enters with three -1/-1 counters. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a -1/-1 counter from Boxtopus.

card.name: Crusty Codger
card.text: Crusty Codger enters with two -1/-1 counters. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a -1/-1 counter from Crusty Codger.

card.name: Fortune Croaker
card.text: When Fortune Croaker enters, you may have Fortune Croaker deal 1 damage to itself and another target creature you control, if you do, draw a card.

card.name: Jack, the Winner
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, you may have Jack deal 2 damage to target other creature you control, if you do and that creature is not destroyed, Jack then deals 2 damage to target opponent.

card.name: Lounging Lizard
card.text: Haste, Skulk, Vanishing 3 (This creature enters with three time counters on it. At the beginning of your upkeep, remove a time counter from it. When the last is removed, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Monkey Business
card.text: Create a Powder Monkey token. Plunder — If an opponent was dealt damage this turn, when this spell resolves, at the beginning of your next upkeep, create a Powder Monkey token.

card.name: Powder Pandemonium
card.text: Create a Powder Monkey token for each time you have triggered a Plunder ability this turn.

card.name: Shakedown
card.text: Shakedown deals 2 damage to target creature you control to put a vulnerable counter on up to two creatures an opponent controls. (When declaring an attack you may choose creatures with Vulnerable controlled by the defending player to block an attacking creature you control.)

card.name: Sunk Cost
card.text: Shuffle target creature or enchantment into its owners library.

card.name: Tahm Kench, The River King
card.text: When Tahm Kench enters, and at the beginning of your upkeep, you may have Tahm Kench mutate target creature an opponent controls under Tahm Kench. At the end of any phase, if Tahm Kench has three or more creatures mutated under him, transform him. When Tahm Kench transforms, exile all creatures mutated under Tahm Kench. Partner --- (Back): Tahm Kench, The Demon of Addiction
card.related: Tahm Kench, The Demon of Addiction

card.name: Tahm Kench, The Demon of Addiction
card.text: When Tahm Kench transforms, and at the beginning of your upkeep, you may have Tahm Kench mutate target creature an opponent controls under Tahm Kench. Whenever Tahm Kench attacks, exile all creatures mutated under Tahm Kench. --- (Front): Tahm Kench, The River King

card.name: The Slaughter Docks
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, Toss 1. (Exile a card from the bottom of your library.) At the end of any phase on your turn, if you are Deep, sacrifice The Slaughter Docks, then reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal a Leviathan creature, put it onto the battlefield under your control, then shuffle. (If your library has one third or fewer cards remaining, rounded down, you get The Abyssal Blessing for the rest of the game. Deep creatures you control get +3/+3 if you have The Abyssal Blessing.)

card.name: Wiggly Burblefish
card.text: Wiggly Burblefish costs {1} less to cast for each instant and sorcery in your graveyard. When Wiggly Burblefish enters, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal three instant and/or sorcery cards, randomly choose one, add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library.

card.name: Wise Fry
card.text: Trample When Wise Fry enters, it deals 1 damage to each other creature you control, then put a number of +1/+0 counters on Wise Fry for each creature you control that took damage this way.

card.name: Aphelios, The Hitman
card.text: Nightfall — When Aphelios enters, if it wasn't the first spell you cast this turn, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal two luna equipment cards, choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. The first time each turn you cast your second spell, other than Aphelios, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal two luna equipment cards, choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. At the end of any phase on your turn, if you control four or more luna equipment cards, transform Aphelios. Partner --- (Back): Aphelios, The Weapon of the Faithful
card.related: Aphelios, The Weapon of the Faithful

card.name: Aphelios, The Weapon of the Faithful
card.text: First strike The first time each turn you cast your second spell, other than Aphelios, and at the beginning of your upkeep, reveal cards from the top of your library until you reveal two luna equipment cards, choose one and add it to your hand, then shuffle all other revealed cards into your library. Luna equipment cards you control cost {2} less to cast. Activated abilities of luna equipment cards you control cost {1} less. --- (Front): Aphelios, The Hitman

card.name: Encroaching Shadows LORT-MTN
card.text: Creatures you cast get +2/+2 and Ephemeral. (That creature has haste. At the end of turn, sacrifice it.)

card.name: Tundra
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.)

card.name: Hallowed Fountain
card.text: ({T}: Add {W} or {U}.) As this land enters, you may pay 2 life. If you don't, it enters tapped.

card.name: Azorius Chancery
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, return a land you control to its owner's hand. {T}: Add {W}{U}.

card.name: Zoe, The Aspect of Twilight LORT-MTN
card.text: Whenever a creature you control enters, if it has first strike, put a first strike counter on each other creature you control. The same is true for flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, trample, and vigilance.

card.name: Emblem LORT-MTN
card.text: The base power of creatures you control is equal to the creature with the highest power you control. The base toughness of creatures you control is equal to the creature with the highest toughness you control.

card.name: Emblem LORT-MTN
card.text: Creatures you control have first strike if a creature you control has first strike. The same is true for flying, deathtouch, double strike, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, skulk, trample, and vigilance.
